ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the item (e.g., each, pack) */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level that triggers a reorder */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the item */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Time it takes for the supplier to deliver the item */,
  "min_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity of the item that can be ordered */,
  "max_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Maximum quantity of the item that can be ordered */,
  "standard_cost" TEXT /* Standard cost of the item */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* Image URL of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact person at the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Supplier rating (e.g., 5-star rating) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the location */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the location (e.g., square footage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item in the inventory */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the item is stored */,
  "current_stock" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the item */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the stock level was last updated */,
  "reorder_status" TEXT /* Reorder status (e.g., 'reorder', 'ok', 'out_of_stock') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "order_number" INTEGER /* Order number assigned to the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the order */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the order is to be delivered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., 'pending', 'shipped', 'received') */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "shipping_cost" TEXT /* Shipping cost of the order */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order detail */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the item in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_details_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_details_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., 'admin', 'warehouse_manager', 'inventory_clerk') */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
